item.title: Just one of the many ways Beyblade technology improves our lives
item.description:
this is why you'll hear camera men sometimes yell, "let it rip!" on movies sets, it's because they're using one of these camera lens covers. https://www.instagram.com/vt.physics
This is why hand sanitizer is called, "the devils lube".
Now that people have figured out birds aren't real, and are just tools of the government to spy on us, the government is experimenting with stealth birds. The shadow keeps giving them ways though.

item.title: Charlie Kirk was a Nazi terrorist
item.description: He was a hate-mongering terrorist who should've been executed for his role in the J6 terror attack and insurrection. One of the terrorists he bussed in and provided accommodations for attacked a Metro police officer with a fire extinguisher. Fuck this whitewashing by our corrupt media. Rest in piss, scumbag.

1
2

5

8
9
10

16

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @tanbeliaart does gorgeous paintings! This one is of Ambuluwawa Tower in Sri Lanka. She's got so much great work in her posts, visit her profile.
27 Vintage Man Tax: Erik Estrada
“Show respect to all people and grovel to none.” - Tecumseh I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting only on that, also comment about something you DID like. Balance the negativity. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Her outfit got him so excited that they had to pull over
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Yip, yip, yup..I did
item.description: They leave their dog outside from 5am until after midnight and it barks constantly. Little chihuahua. The owner is unemployed and I guess doesn't want to hear it bark inside her own home? I thought about reporting a noise violation, but I knew the spca would take a case of suspected neglect way more seriously than the cops would a noise complaint. Silence outside for 2 days now. . No regrets
item.dc:creator: PostTraumaticStressDisorderr

item.title: Give your dump a unique title…
item.dc:creator: HipLibrarian

item.description: In 1836, a sewer hunter named Jon Smiff was navigating the labyrinthine drains beneath London when he discovered a forgotten passage that led directly into the Bank of England’s gold vault. Smiff, an illiterate but resourceful worker, realized the gravity of his find and chose not to exploit it. Instead, he penned a note, likely with help, requesting a meeting with the bank’s directors inside the vault itself, at a time of their choosing. When the appointed hour arrived, Smiff dramatically emerged from beneath the vault floor, startling the officials and proving his claim. The directors were so impressed by his honesty and discretion that they rewarded him financially and sealed the passage permanently....
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: BAM. The day after the US loses an $8 billion air defense deal to Italy, Portugal switches its multi-billion dollar American fighter jet deal to France. Europeans have no interest in having their defenses tied to Russian puppet state.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Double standards, selective outrage, confirmation bias
item.description:
P1. This is the message that anyone on the "conservative" side of politics should hear.
P2. The right-wing has become fervently resistant to hearing the truth. They exercise cognitive dissonance and confirmation bias in a deep salad bowl of denial. The tongs need to be taken away so they can't keep tossing their lies around. Remember this message and use it whenever you can, as opportunities arise. YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/9iI-vtifUVw Transcript: https://playingintheworldgame.com/2025/09/13/the-double-standard-and-selective-outrage/
item.dc:creator: cytherians

item.title: So when is this guy getting fired?
item.description: For those who don't know, this is 22 year old Thomas Fugate. A Trump Administration appointee tasked with leading, yes, leading, the government on prevention of hate crimes and targeted violence. I guess the assassination of Charlie Kirk was to be expected, and domestic terrorism of all kinds will continue and rise exponentially, because this little weasel rich boy Trumpling bitch is the best the USA can offer
